title: Competitive Positioning Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Competitive Positioning skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

list_direct_indirect.description: List of direct and indirect competitors operating in the target market

defined_target_customer.description: Defined target customer segment(s) with articulated buying criteria

own_product_service.description: Own product or service feature set and known customer perception data

winloss_analysis_data.description: Win/loss analysis data from the sales function

customer_prospect_survey.description: Customer or prospect survey data on brand perception and competitive preference
